questions.text: When you read, what format do you prefer — physical books, e-reader, or audio? And when do you usually read — before bed, on flights, or do you read in dedicated sessions?

Are you into gaming currently? If so, what platform — console, PC, mobile — and do you mostly play solo (RPGs, story games) or with others (multiplayer, co-op)? Or is it more of an 'occasional thing when I have time' thing?

Do you have a specific philosophical or spiritual framework you lean on — like Buddhism, Stoicism, some mix of ideas, or nothing formal? Or is it more like 'I figure things out as I go' without a label?
Do you take photos — with your phone or a camera? Are you someone who documents their travels and daily life, or do you prefer being in the moment without capturing it?
How do you handle bureaucracy and administrative tasks — things like taxes, visas, insurance, paperwork? Do you tackle them immediately, procrastinate until they become urgent, or hire help?
